title: gilia lutea var. aurea
intro: Gilia lutea var. aurea, also known as golden gilia, is a plant species belonging to the Polemoniaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Gilia lutea var. aurea is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
